memory.summary: My friend invited me to lunch, creating a social opportunity that conflicts with my plan to finish the assignment analysis first.

goals.description: Verify completion of the course assignment analysis section to ensure it meets submission requirements before Monday 18:00.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Mon 18:00; progress is at 1.0 but final verification is required to prevent last-minute errors.

goals.description: Confirm the assigned reading has been fully processed and is ready for review or submission by Monday 20:00.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Mon 20:00 (after the assignment); ensures both soft tasks are finalized in sequence.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances g1 (assignment verification) by protecting study time. (b) Weighs social relationship; instead of ignoring the friend group, I offer a short boundary to preserve closeness while prioritizing the urgent deadline.
